CustomField.description: Formula image field. Renders nepa_defensibility_score__c (0–100) as a green/gray progress bar 200px wide. Displayed directly beneath nepa_risk_score_bar__c in the Risk Intelligence panel — a red bar at 85% above a green bar at 91% makes the core v3 story visible in one glance: high-risk project, fully documented mitigation. Designed for Scene 4-B in the CEQ Permitting Innovators demo.
CustomField.formula: IF(nepa_defensibility_score__c > 0, IMAGE("/img/samples/color_green.gif", TEXT(ROUND(nepa_defensibility_score__c, 0)) & "/100 Defensibility", 14, ROUND(nepa_defensibility_score__c * 2, 0)) & IMAGE("/s.gif", " ", 14, 200 - ROUND(nepa_defensibility_score__c * 2, 0)), IMAGE("/s.gif", "No Score", 14, 200) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Defensibility Score visualized as a green progress bar (200px wide). Width = score × 2. Score of 91 = 182px green bar.
CustomField.label: Defensibility Bar
